steps.title: Apply the triangle inequality
steps.content: With sides 9 and 14, the third side $x$ must satisfy $x \lt 9+14=23$ and $x \gt  |9-14|=5$.

steps.title: Match the answer
steps.content: That matches the correct answer — C is correct.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: The final check is to match the computed result to the answer choices. The value or equation found above is $5 \lt x \lt 23$. The other choices do not satisfy the same condition from the question, so C is correct.
